# Juneteenth Barcelona

> Juneteenth Barcelona is a community celebration of Black freedom, heritage, and culture for the African diaspora and allies in Barcelona, Spain. Our first-ever edition took place on Saturday, June 20, 2026 at Roots Gastro Club in Poblenou and was a resounding success, welcoming 400+ attendees and participants for a day of live music and performances, an international food fair, craft and market vendors, workshops, line dancing and roller-skating demos, and a night party.

Juneteenth (June 19) commemorates the emancipation of enslaved African Americans, dating to June 19, 1865 in Galveston, Texas. Juneteenth Barcelona brings that spirit of freedom and community to Barcelona through an annual flagship event, a monthly meetup series, a self-guided Black-history walking tour of the city, and an online merchandise shop. The project is jointly operated by Kevin Hawkins BV and Asociación Cultural Spanish Harlem BCN.

## Event 2026 highlights

- 400+ attendees and participants at our first-ever event — a milestone for the Black community and allies in Barcelona
- Held 13:00–02:00 at Roots Gastro Club, Carrer de Badajoz 115, Poblenou, Barcelona
- 14+ live music acts and DJs, plus line dancing and roller-skating demonstrations
- An international food hall and craft/market vendors
- Two parts: a family-friendly Community Day followed by a Night Party

## Main pages

- [Home](https://juneteenth.es/): Event overview, full lineup/schedule, food and market vendors, venue, and FAQ.
- [About](https://juneteenth.es/about.html): Who we are, our story, and our mission.
- [Shop](https://juneteenth.es/shop.html): Official Juneteenth Barcelona merchandise — tees, hoodies, hats, tote bags and more, printed on demand and shipped worldwide.
- [Monthly Meetup](https://juneteenth.es/monthly-events.html): BJuneteenth Monthly — free community gatherings for the African diaspora and allies.
- [Walking Tour](https://juneteenth.es/walking-tour/index.html): A self-guided Black-history walking tour of Barcelona.
- [Sponsors & Partners](https://juneteenth.es/sponsors.html): Partnership and sponsorship opportunities.
- [Contact](https://juneteenth.es/contact.html): Get in touch with the organisers.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://juneteenth.es/privacy.html): How we collect, use, and protect personal data.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://juneteenth.es/terms.html): Terms for attending, purchasing, and using the site.
- [Legal Information](https://juneteenth.es/legal.html): Operator and legal notice.
- [Code of Conduct](https://juneteenth.es/code-of-conduct.html): Community standards for our events and spaces.
